name: Format Number to USD
short_description: Formats a numerical value as a USD currency string with two decimal places and comma separators.

inputs.name: x
inputs.description: The numerical value to format.

name: Format as Percentage
short_description: Formats a float number as a percentage string with two decimal places.

inputs.name: x
inputs.description: The number to be formatted as a percentage (e.g., 7.5 becomes '7.50%').

name: Format Decimal Rate
short_description: Formats a decimal rate to a string with 6 decimal places.

inputs.name: x
inputs.description: A decimal monthly rate (e.g., 0.00625).

name: Generate Valid Years Paid
short_description: Generates a random integer for years paid, ensuring it is strictly less than the total number of years for the loan and at least 1.

inputs.name: total_years
inputs.description: The total duration of the loan or payment schedule in years.

inputs.name: max_paid
inputs.description: An optional upper limit for the randomly generated years paid. If not provided or if it's greater than or equal to total_years, the effective limit defaults to max(1, total_years - 1).

name: Simple Interest Loan Repayment
short_description: Calculates the total amount to be repaid for a loan with simple interest, settled as a single payment at the end of the term.

inputs.name: loan_amount
inputs.description: The initial principal amount of the loan.

inputs.name: interest_rate_pct
inputs.description: The annual simple interest rate as a percentage (e.g., 5 for 5%).

inputs.name: loan_term_years
inputs.description: The duration of the loan in years.

name: Standard Loan Amortization Monthly Payment
short_description: Calculates the standard monthly payment for a fully amortizing loan with fixed interest rate.

inputs.name: loan_amount
inputs.description: Total principal amount of the loan

inputs.name: annual_rate_pct
inputs.description: Annual interest rate as a percentage (e.g., 5.0 for 5%)

inputs.name: term_years
inputs.description: Total duration of the loan in years

name: Loan Repayment with Annual Extra Principal Payments
short_description: Calculates the new payoff time and early repayment duration for a loan with fixed monthly payments and an additional annual principal payment towards the principal.

inputs.name: loan_amount
inputs.description: Initial loan principal amount.

inputs.name: annual_rate_pct
inputs.description: Annual interest rate as a percentage (e.g., 5.0 for 5%).

inputs.name: term_years
inputs.description: Original loan term in years.

inputs.name: extra_annual
inputs.description: Fixed additional payment made towards the principal at the end of each year.

name: Loan Refinancing: New Monthly Payment
short_description: Compute remaining balance after a period of payments on the original loan, then calculate the new monthly payment for a refinanced loan with a new rate and term.

inputs.name: P
inputs.description: Original principal amount of the loan

inputs.name: orig_rate_pct
inputs.description: Original annual interest rate of the loan (as a percentage, e.g., 5.0 for 5%)

inputs.name: orig_term_years
inputs.description: Original total term of the loan in years

inputs.name: years_paid
inputs.description: Number of years payments have been made on the original loan

inputs.name: new_rate_pct
inputs.description: New annual interest rate for the refinanced loan (as a percentage, e.g., 3.0 for 3%)

inputs.name: new_term_years
inputs.description: New total term of the refinanced loan in years

name: Loan Repayment: Early Payoff (Lump Sum, Same Payment)
short_description: After a lump-sum payment at time t, continue paying the SAME monthly payment (no recast).

inputs.name: P
inputs.description: Original principal amount of the loan.

inputs.name: rate_pct
inputs.description: Annual nominal interest rate as a percentage (e.g., 4.5 for 4.5%).

inputs.name: term_years
inputs.description: Original term of the loan in years.

inputs.name: years_paid
inputs.description: Number of full years for which regular payments have been made.

inputs.name: lump_sum
inputs.description: The amount of the lump-sum payment made after 'years_paid'.

name: Generate Financial Templates
short_description: A utility function that iterates through various financial calculation templates, generates multiple problem instances with different random seeds, and compiles them into a structured JSON output file.

inputs.name: output_file
inputs.description: The file path where the generated financial problems will be saved in JSON format.

inputs.name: num_instances
inputs.description: The number of problem instances to generate for each financial template function.
